outline.title: Unity Collective — Phase 2 Complete
outline.summary: Title slide: Phase 2 End-to-End Business Onboarding is complete. Pan-African theme, bold mission statement.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Phase 2 Delivered Four Interconnected Features
outline.summary: Overview of the four Phase 2 deliverables: Onboarding Wizard, Black-Owned Badge, Member Dashboard, and Admin Verification Flow — showing how they form a complete end-to-end pipeline.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: The 5-Step Onboarding Wizard Guides Every New Business
outline.summary: Business Onboarding Wizard (Lane B): 5-step guided flow at /onboarding — Account, Business Profile, Verify, Products, Review. Step indicator, inline validation, mock persistence.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: The Black-Owned Badge Makes Identity Visible and Verifiable
outline.summary: Pan-African gradient verification badge (red→black→green, gold border) displayed on BusinessDetail and MemberDashboard. All 6 mock businesses carry the isBlackOwned flag.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: The Member Dashboard Puts Vendors in Control of Their Business
outline.summary: Member Dashboard at /dashboard: business info card with both badges, Business Verified banner, full product management grid (Add/Edit/Delete). Redirect guards protect the route.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: The Admin Verification Flow Closes the Loop on Lane A
outline.summary: Admin Verification Flow: pending queue with live badge count, two-pane review UI, Approve/Reject/Override actions wired to mockOnboarding store. Real-time status updates across the platform.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Six Key Features Power the Admin Review Experience
outline.summary: Deep-dive on the 6 admin flow capabilities: Pending queue, Review detail pane, Approve action, Reject with reason, Override, and real-time counter updates.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: One Shared Store Connects Both Lanes End-to-End
outline.summary: Architecture diagram showing how mockOnboarding store connects Lane B (vendor submits) to Lane A (admin reviews) and propagates verificationStatus to BusinessDetail and MemberDashboard.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Phase 2 Is 100% Complete — 7 PRs Merged, Zero Open Issues
outline.summary: Status table of all Phase 2 deliverables with PR numbers, file counts, and test results. Build passes cleanly.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Phase 3 Replaces Every Mock with a Live Production Service
outline.summary: Phase 3 roadmap: Firebase Auth (replace mock auth), Firestore (replace mock data), Stripe (activate payment stub), Firebase Storage (real image uploads). The mock architecture was designed to make this swap surgical.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: The Infrastructure for Black Economic Empowerment Is Ready
outline.summary: Closing slide: the platform is technically complete, end-to-end tested, and ready for Phase 3 production wiring. Call to action for Phase 3.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed
